curation_notes: Patch modifies only vyper/codegen/stmt.py (1 non-test source file). The fix adds a clamp check in _parse_For_range for Type 3 range-based for-loops (for i in range(x, x+N)) to ensure the start value plus the loop count does not overflow the iterator's integer type. No sibling files share this pattern — loop codegen is centralized in stmt.py. Pre-assigned class integer-overflow (CWE-190) is correct.
